ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "from_location" TEXT /* Origin location of the event */,
  "to_location" TEXT /* Destination location of the event */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of information regarding the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the event */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_to_location FOREIGN KEY ("to_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES event_statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_from_location FOREIGN KEY ("from_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., stadium, arena) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the location's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is active and can be used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Tournament, Exhibition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event type is active and can be used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., event coordinator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being logged */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the attendee is registered for */,
  "attendee_name" TEXT /* Name of the attendee */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the attendee */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the attendee registered */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attendance is confirmed */,
  "is_canceled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attendance is canceled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendees_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attachment was uploaded */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attachment is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attachments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the preference belongs */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, update) */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification is enabled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_invitees" (
  "invitee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invitee */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the invitee is associated with */,
  "invitee_name" TEXT /* Name of the invitee */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invitee (e.g., accepted, declined) */,
  "invited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who invited the invitee */,
  "invited_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the invitee was invited */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the invitee responded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invitee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_invitees_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_invitees_invited_by FOREIGN KEY ("invited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
